{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of Heaven
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] activated the fourth [[Path of Heaven]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] had activated the eighth [[Path of Heaven]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
